title: The Privacy Paradox: Power and Peril of Client Data
body:
The Privacy Paradox: Power and Peril of Client Data

Data is the new currency of the insurance industry, fueling innovation in underwriting, risk segmentation, and customer service. But with greater access to client information comes greater responsibility — and potential exposure. This webinar examines the delicate balance between personalization and privacy, uncovering the myths of consent, the dangers of over-collection, and the reputational risks of misuse. You will leave with practical tools to minimize risk, safeguard sensitive information, and build stronger client trust in an increasingly data-driven environment.

Pricing

Webinar Details

The Privacy Paradox: Power and Peril of Client Data

Unlock the power of client data while avoiding costly missteps. Discover smart strategies to protect privacy, reduce risk, and keep client confidence strong.

Topics

  • Explore how modern insurance operations harness customer data for underwriting, claims, and personalization.
  • Examine common privacy risks that can lead to financial penalties, lawsuits, and reputational harm.
  • Understand the evolving legal landscape and clients’ growing concerns around consent and transparency.
  • Build strategies for responsible data use through best practices in security, disclosures, and vendor management.
  • Learn how to reinforce trust by integrating privacy awareness into everyday client interactions.
